default.author: Sarah M.
default.quote: I've never had a piece of jewelry that feels so intentional. The weight, the texture, the way it catches the light — it's clearly made by someone who cares deeply about their craft.

default.author: Rachel K.
default.quote: Allison made my wedding band from recycled copper and a stone I found on a trip with my grandmother. I cry every time I look at it. Truly one of a kind.

default.author: Jennifer L.
default.quote: I bought the autumn collection earrings last year and wear them almost daily. They're the only jewelry I get asked about constantly. People can feel the difference.
